pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target properties are not updated to 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit maven compiler source and target properties set to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the Maven compiler plugin uses Java 21 language features and bytecode, preventing compilation errors on new JDK syntax.
